levels.name: Home Row
levels.sub: Find the keys under your fingers

curriculum.focus: Keyboard fluency to create written texts
Use phonic knowledge of common and less common grapheme–phoneme relationships
Understand and write complex sentences for particular purposes and audiences

levels.name: Roots & Affixes
levels.sub: Latin and Greek roots, prefixes and suffixes

curriculum.focus: Use knowledge of word origins including Latin and Greek roots, prefixes and suffixes
Spell using phonic, morphemic and grammatical knowledge

levels.name: Capitals
levels.sub: Proper nouns, titles and sentence starts

curriculum.focus: Understand how proper nouns and titles use capital letters

levels.name: Punctuated Sentences
levels.sub: Edit and publish with precise punctuation

curriculum.focus: Plan, create, edit and publish written texts with precise punctuation
